title: galarhoeus lucorum
intro: Galarhoeus lucorum, also known as Chinese gallicum, is a type of plant in the nettle family, Urticaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, Galarhoeus lucorum is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
